calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-20-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-06-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Linda Y. Chan, Esq. appeared for plaintiff State Farm General Insurance Company.
Joe Malta, owner of the subject premises, was placed under oath and examined.
Hayoood B. Harvey, Claim Representative for State Farm General Insurance Company, was placed under oath but did not testify.
No appearance by defendant Billy Chan.
Default was entered against defendant on November 4, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed November 4, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff State Farm General Insurance Company, and against the Defaulted Defendant Billy Chan as follows:

Damages/Principal - $147,126.17.
Prejudgment Interest - $29,147.11.
Attorney's Fees - $0.00.
Costs - $496.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $176,769.28.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
